'''rakafa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:tablemaid|tablemaid]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-k-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:tablemaid|tablemaid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| rakafa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:rækæfæth|rækæfæth]] || [[word:rækæfæj|rækæfæj]] || [[word:rækæfæsh|rækæfæsh]] || [[word:rækæfæ|rækæfæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:rakakafath|rakakafath]] || [[word:rakakafaj|rakakafaj]] || [[word:rakakafash|rakakafash]] || [[word:rakakafa|rakakafa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:rakafath|rakafath]] || [[word:rakafaj|rakafaj]] || [[word:rakafash|rakafash]] || [[word:rakafa|rakafa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:rakaffath|rakaffath]] || [[word:rakaffaj|rakaffaj]] || [[word:rakaffash|rakaffash]] || [[word:rakaffaf|rakaffaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:rakafatha|rakafatha]] || [[word:rakafaja|rakafaja]] || [[word:rakafasha|rakafasha]] || [[word:rakafaka|rakafaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:rakafath|rakafath]] || [[word:rakafaj|rakafaj]] || [[word:rakafash|rakafash]] || [[word:rakafa|rakafa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:rakafathal|rakafathal]] || [[word:rakafajal|rakafajal]] || [[word:rakafashal|rakafashal]] || [[word:rakafakal|rakafakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:rakafathatha|rakafathatha]] || [[word:rakafajaja|rakafajaja]] || [[word:rakafashasha|rakafashasha]] || [[word:rakafaka|rakafaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:rakafathan|rakafathan]] || [[word:rakafajan|rakafajan]] || [[word:rakafashan|rakafashan]] || [[word:rakafakan|rakafakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:rakafathaoro|rakafathaoro]] || [[word:rakafajaoro|rakafajaoro]] || [[word:rakafashaoro|rakafashaoro]] || [[word:rakafakaoro|rakafakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
